title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a holiday apartment.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: How was the apartment by the sea? || Man: Lovely inside. It had a big kitchen and the beds were comfortable. The beach was close, too. [8]The problem was the noise from the restaurant below us. People were leaving very late every night[/8]. || Woman: That's a shame. I know you wanted somewhere peaceful. || Woman: Anyway, I’ll let you know what happens, because it is one of those small things that seems easy until you have to deal with it yourself.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How was the apartment by the sea?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Lovely inside. It had a big kitchen and the beds were comfortable. The beach was close, too. The problem was the noise from the restaurant below us. People were leaving very late every night.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That's a shame. I know you wanted somewhere peaceful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Anyway, I’ll let you know what happens, because it is one of those small things that seems easy until you have to deal with it yourself.

questions.question: What problem did the man have with the apartment?

options.A: It was far from the beach.

questions.explanation: He says there was noise from the restaurant below, with people leaving late every night.

extracts.context: You will hear a girl talking to a teacher about a drama club.
extracts.audio_script: Teacher: Are you joining the drama club again this term? || Girl: I'd like to, but I'm not sure. I enjoyed acting in the play, and the other students were friendly. [9]The trouble is that rehearsals are on Thursdays now, and that's when I have my swimming lesson[/9]. || Teacher: Perhaps you could come to the first meeting and then decide. || Man: Still, I’m glad we talked about it, because it helps to hear another opinion before making a final decision about something like this.

dialogue.speaker: teacher
dialogue.text: Are you joining the drama club again this term?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I'd like to, but I'm not sure. I enjoyed acting in the play, and the other students were friendly. The trouble is that rehearsals are on Thursdays now, and that's when I have my swimming lesson.

dialogue.speaker: teacher
dialogue.text: Perhaps you could come to the first meeting and then decide.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Still, I’m glad we talked about it, because it helps to hear another opinion before making a final decision about something like this.

questions.question: Why is the girl unsure about joining the drama club?

options.A: It is at the same time as another activity.
options.B: She did not enjoy the last play.
options.C: She does not know the other students.

questions.explanation: The girl says rehearsals are on Thursdays, when she has her swimming lesson.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a new supermarket.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Have you tried the new supermarket near the station? || Woman: Yes. It's smaller than I expected, but it has most things. The vegetables looked fresh, and the staff were polite. [10]I just wish the signs above the aisles were clearer, because I spent ages looking for ordinary things[/10]. || Man: I had the same problem finding bread. || Woman: I suppose it is a good lesson for next time, and at least I know what to check before I make any plans again.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you tried the new supermarket near the station?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes. It's smaller than I expected, but it has most things. The vegetables looked fresh, and the staff were polite. I just wish the signs above the aisles were clearer, because I spent ages looking for ordinary things.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I had the same problem finding bread.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I suppose it is a good lesson for next time, and at least I know what to check before I make any plans again.

questions.question: What does the woman dislike about the supermarket?

options.B: It is hard to find products.

questions.explanation: She says the aisle signs are not clear and she spent a long time looking for things.

extracts.context: You will hear a man talking about learning to drive.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: How are your driving lessons going? || Man: Better now. At first I was afraid of busy roads, but my instructor is very patient. I can park quite well, too. [11]The thing I still find difficult is remembering to check the mirrors often enough[/11]. || Woman: Everyone says that takes time, so don't worry. || Woman: Anyway, it was useful to talk it through, because now the whole situation feels a bit clearer than it did before.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How are your driving lessons going?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Better now. At first I was afraid of busy roads, but my instructor is very patient. I can park quite well, too. The thing I still find difficult is remembering to check the mirrors often enough.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Everyone says that takes time, so don't worry.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Anyway, it was useful to talk it through, because now the whole situation feels a bit clearer than it did before.

questions.question: What does the man find difficult about driving?
questions.explanation: He says he still finds it difficult to remember to check the mirrors often enough.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a clothes shop.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you find anything in that new clothes shop? || Woman: Yes, a jacket for work. I thought the prices would be high, but they weren't. The changing rooms were tiny though. [12]What impressed me most was the assistant. She understood exactly what style I needed[/12]. || Man: That's unusual. In some shops they hardly listen. || Woman: I’ll remember that for the future, because small details like that can make a normal day much easier or much more difficult.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you find anything in that new clothes shop?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, a jacket for work. I thought the prices would be high, but they weren't. The changing rooms were tiny though. What impressed me most was the assistant. She understood exactly what style I needed.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's unusual. In some shops they hardly listen.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I’ll remember that for the future, because small details like that can make a normal day much easier or much more difficult.

questions.question: What did the woman like most about the shop?
questions.explanation: She says the assistant impressed her most because she understood what style was needed.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking to a friend about a course.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Have you started your evening course yet? || Woman: Yes, Spanish for beginners. The teacher is great, and the book is easy to follow. [13]I just didn't realise how much speaking we'd have to do in pairs. That's good practice, but I feel shy with people I don't know[/13]. || Man: You'll probably feel more confident soon. || Woman: That’s true. I think I know what to do now, and I’m glad I didn’t make the decision too quickly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you started your evening course yet?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, Spanish for beginners. The teacher is great, and the book is easy to follow. I just didn't realise how much speaking we'd have to do in pairs. That's good practice, but I feel shy with people I don't know.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: You'll probably feel more confident soon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That’s true. I think I know what to do now, and I’m glad I didn’t make the decision too quickly.

questions.question: What does the woman say about the course?

options.A: The course book is too difficult.
options.B: She feels uncomfortable speaking in pairs.

questions.explanation: She says she feels shy speaking in pairs with people she does not know.
